what_failed: v1 PDF rendered in portrait orientation — looked like a document not a presentation
fix_applied: Added @page { size: 13.333in 7.5in; margin: 0; } and aspect-ratio: 16/9 on .slide

what_failed: Chrome headless added date, title, URL, and page numbers to PDF
4th stat box wrapped to second row — grid was auto-fit
fix_applied: Changed grid-template-columns from repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr)) to repeat(4, 1fr)

what_failed: Steps only used left 40% of slide — right half was completely empty
fix_applied: Changed steps to full-width card rows with background, border, border-radius. Added flex: 1 to .steps

what_failed: Content bunched at top of slide with massive empty space below
fix_applied: Added display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center to .slide-body

what_failed: Stat numbers were 42px — too small for presentation slides
python-pptx generates basic boxes and text — no design quality for client presentations
fix_applied: Switched to HTML-first approach: generate rich HTML with CSS → convert to PDF via Chrome headless

what_failed: Using system fonts made output look like AI-generated slop
fix_applied: Use Outfit for display, Space Mono for code, IBM Plex Sans Arabic for RTL. Never Inter/Roboto/Arial
